headline: Microsoft’s OCI, Security, And Healthcare AI Moves Versus Current Valuation
summary: Microsoft co founded the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) MSA consortium with AMD, Broadcom, Meta, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to set open standards for large scale optical links in AI data centers. The company expanded its security reach through new Azure focused partnerships with Upwind and DataBahn targeting real time protection, detection, and cost efficiency. Microsoft is working with HABS on Neuro AI and integrating Copilot Health with HealthEx, extending its human centric AI work in...

headline: More Pain at the Pump | Heard on the Street Friday Recap
summary: What Happened in Markets at the End of Last Week Oil prices stayed high. Brent crude picked up another 2.7% to stay above the $100 mark on Friday. This despite the U.S. loosening some restrictions on the purchase of Russian oil in an effort to ease the global supply crunch.

headline: Navigating Market Uncertainty: Intrinsic Value of Broadcom Inc
summary: Instead of using future free cash flow as in the traditional DCF model, the GuruFocus DCF calculator uses EPS without NRI as the default for the DCF model based on research that shows that historically stock prices have been more correlated with earnings than free cash flow. Warning! GuruFocus has detected 2 Warning Sign with AVGO.

content.title: Navigating Market Uncertainty: Intrinsic Value of Broadcom Inc
content.summary: Instead of using future free cash flow as in the traditional DCF model, the GuruFocus DCF calculator uses EPS without NRI as the default for the DCF model based on research that shows that historically stock prices have been more correlated with earnings than free cash flow. Warning! GuruFocus has detected 2 Warning Sign with AVGO.

headline: Broadcom Expands AI Data Center Role With New Hardware And Standards
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced its Taurus 400G/lane optical DSP and Tomahawk 6 AI switch family, expanding its AI data center hardware lineup. The company is helping launch the Optical Compute Interconnect open standard with partners including AMD, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI. These developments aim to support higher bandwidth connectivity, power efficiency, and multi vendor interoperability for hyperscale AI data centers. Broadcom is already a key name in AI...

headline: Industry Leaders to Define Specification for Next-Generation 400G Optical Links
summary: LOS ANGELES, March 16, 2026--A group of industry-leading networking, semiconductor, and optics companies today announced the formation of the 400G Optical MSA (400 Gbps Optical Multi-Source Agreement) to develop the specifications for optical interfaces required to enable a broad ecosystem of interoperable solutions. Under the MSA, participating companies will address the technical challenges of achieving optical interfaces utilizing 400G optical technology to ensure optical interoperability for

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO): Read This Before Placing a Bet

headline: Why AI Infrastructure Stocks Could Be the Smartest Buy in a Flat 2026 Market
summary: Back in the California Gold Rush, most men who chased the glitter came home with blisters, debts, and a handful of “I almost struck it rich” stories. On the other hand, the men who sold them picks, shovels, wagons, and whiskey did far better for themselves. Today’s investors are making the same old mistake as the glitter chasers.
